message:
feat(core): add instrumentation probes and correlation context for latency stages (ft-2p9cb.1.2.1)

CorrelationContext propagates run/correlation IDs across async pipeline boundaries
with gap detection and propagation integrity tracking. StageProbe/StageTiming provide
lightweight begin/end timing lifecycle. InstrumentationOverhead tracks probe cost
against a 1μs budget. InstrumentedEnforcer combines enforcement + overhead tracking.
27 new unit tests (96 total), all 34 proptests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
